title: Jinan, Shandong — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Jinan, Shandong: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Jinan is a city in Shandong with a population of 9,200,000. Capital of Shandong province, famous for its artesian springs, willow trees, and role as a cultural and educational center.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
